acceptance.assertion: pytest -q tests/test_grips.py can collect and run without relying on tests/test_checkouts.py having executed first.
Grip test import behavior is deterministic across supported test collection orders.
The fix is confined to test harness/setup or an equivalent non-production compatibility boundary and does not weaken production mcp import requirements.
The full Grabowski test suite remains green.

approval.note: Fix test harness or test setup only; do not weaken production MCP import requirements.

goal: Remove the pre-existing test-order dependency where tests/test_grips.py relies on tests/test_checkouts.py having already installed a fake mcp module, so grip tests can be collected and run independently without changing outcomes based on module order.

metadata.live_basis: Standalone tests/test_grips.py import failed because fake mcp registration was implicitly supplied by tests/test_checkouts.py in canonical combined order; full suite remained green.

title: Make test_grips independently importable and order-independent
